title: Pan-Seared Fish with Salty Crust
description: A simple yet flavorful fish dish with a crispy salty crust, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Salty
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt like Maldon

ingredients.name: Portuguese
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality Portuguese seasoning blend

instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the fish fillets with the Portuguese seasoning blend.
Sprinkle the flaky sea salt over both sides of the fish fillets.
Add a small amount of oil to the preheated skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the fish fillets to the skillet, skin side up (if they have skin).
Cook for 3-4 minutes on the first side, or until golden brown.
Flip the fish over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
